posts.author: firefueled
posts.text: On the surface, the company still delivered decent growth, but the cash generation did not keep up with the headline numbers, which makes the execution look weaker than it first appears. The biggest concern is cash flow . Revenue was about ₹4,251 crore and PAT was about ₹149 crore , but operating cash flow was only about ₹100 crore . At the same time, capex stayed heavy at roughly ₹340.97 crore , so a large part of the expansion is being funded through cash outflow rather than internal generation. The next worry is the balance sheet. Cash came down to about ₹35.87 crore from ₹79.78 crore , whi…
